title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Following the start of the year, we see continuous activity on both dry and tanker markets. The dry cargo market has held up with a steady flow of transactions, while the tanker sector has seen particularly strong momentum, driven by significant VLCC deals that have set a confident tone for the opening weeks of the year. Dry Cargo
In the larger segment, we are hearing rumors of a 2011 Japanese built Capesize being committed at levels of USD 32.5 m net, while at the Kamsarmax front, the CENTURY SHANGHAI (ABT 81K DWT, 2018, CHENGXI) has been sold via auction for USD 25.02 m.
